sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60633" key="*kuklografi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Κυκλο-γρᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n60633.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">description, tracing of a circle</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4013.tlg002:210:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Simp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cael.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">210.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
